title: Minor voluntarily eloping with lover does not amount to kidnapping: Chhattisgarh High Court
description: The Chhattisgarh High Court recently held that a person cannot be booked for kidnapping if a minor girl elopes with him voluntarily [Deepak Vaishnav vs. State of Chhattisgarh]. A bench of Chief Justice Ramesh Sinha and Justice Ravindra Kumar Agrawal acquitted a 24-year-old man who had been sentenced to 20 years under the Protection of Children from Sexual Offences (POCSO) Act after a 15-year-old girl had left home for school and later eloped with him.The Court held that there was no evidence to
